input.cmd:
# Check the other long-running containers - what are they?
for c in jolly_kepler priceless_blackwell agitated_elbakyan dazzling_gagarin cool_chatterjee angry_lichterman practical_lichterman vibrant_haibt priceless_pasteur nostalgic_wing exciting_solomon loving_robinson; do
  echo "=== $c ==="
  docker inspect $c --format 'Image: {{.Config.Image}} | Env: {{json .Config.Env}} | Network: {{json .NetworkSettings.Networks}}' 2>&1 | head -3
done

# Time requests from within the same network
docker exec sreft-fa-load /calm-svc 2>&1 | head -5 || true
# Try to time a request to the web service from the load container's network
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code} - Total: %{time_total}s, TTFB: %{time_starttransfer}s\n" http://192.168.107.3:8080/orders 2>&1

# Check if there's a compose file we can look at
docker inspect sreft-web --format '{{index .Config.Labels "com.docker.compose.project.config_files"}}' 2>&1

# Check the operator container for any config files or scripts
ls -la /tmp/ /root/ /home/ 2>&1
